rulings.Case Title: ALFREDO CHAVEZ VS. ASBESTPS DEFTS(B/P) AS RELECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, March 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff ALFREDO CHAVEZ¿s motion to tax costs was continued from February 9, 2010. The only issue remaining for decision is expert fees of Dr. Smith. Half of those fees, $4439.70, are taxed as attributable to the summary judgment declaration. The other half is allowed as attributable to trial preparation. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROGER RUSICH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Juanita Rusich As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, March 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Plaintiff¿s motion to appoint Juanita Rusich as successor-in-interest to deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff¿s request that first amended complaint be deemed served on all defendants who have previously appeared is granted on the condition that plaintiff serve any defendant who requests it. =(220/HEK)
